body.title: Day 2026-07-08
body.text:
## Done
- Inference router rebuilt as 4 composable stacks; monolith deleted (6/6 tickets proven)
- CAUGHT A BAD CLOSE: the cutover proof was env-dependent AND encoded a wrong invariant; its green hid a real bug —
  coding resolved to a tool-less model that CONFABULATED completion (claimed it wrote a file; wrote nothing).
  Fixed (devstral features=['tools'] + coding-needs-tools), proof rewritten hermetic, re-closed proven.
- Broke the device -> domains -> agentic_loop -> device CYCLE (hidden by a function-local lazy import)
- Evicted the coding agent from the inference proxy (agentic_loop/architect_editor/block_apply/edit_format/...)
- Decided the domains architecture: global domains shared, specialized domain owned by its device,
  the default IS the general domain, escalation is a policy, and SPECIALIZATION IS GRADUATING DEBT
- Day-close audit: fixed a silently-disabled core_values guard; found the graduation apparatus is dead code
